prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第109名→2022年第103名→2023年第 106名→2024年第109名→2025年第109名→2026年第107名，排名稳定在100–110区间，属中上游211；该校未出现在近年声誉舆情及投档异常记录中，声誉平稳；抖 音综合热度排名第93位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量中等，无明显报考升温信号；学科评估数据中未收录该校A-及以上等级学科，但该校以电气工程、机械工 程、化工等工科见长，电气工程及其自动化专业在河北省内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业2024–2026年社会热度 持续偏热/高热推荐；河北省物理类考生2021年21.6万→2025年36.3万，持续增长；2026年总考生约60.98万，按近年比例估算物理类约36.4万，较2025年略增，呈上升趋势，反映整体竞争加剧；河北工业大学位于天津市，是河北省唯一一所211大学，在本省招生占比极高（物理类2025 年计划3591人），本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好稳固。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年计划小幅扩招约1%、物理类考生数略增， 预计2026年位次较2025年略有回调（更难进），但扩招和考生增加抵消部分回调压力；预测最低位次约75574名，区间75074–76074名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 88132 → 70669 → 65566 → 60449 → 75607. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 15158 places compared to 2024, showing significant fluctuation. Over the past five years, the overall trend was forward (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025 it moved backward substantially, with a baseline ranking of about 75607. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 3324 in 2021, 3249 in 2022, 3363 in 2023, 3528 in 2024, and 3591 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 3628, a slight increase of about 1.03% over 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 109th in 2021 → 103rd in 2022 → 106th in 2023 → 109th in 2024 → 109th in 2025 → 107th in 2026, stable in the 100–110 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university has not appeared in recent reputation incidents or abnormal admission records, maintaining a stable reputation. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average,' with moderate short video exposure and no obvious signs of rising application heat. In discipline evaluation data, no A- or above disciplines are recorded, but the university is known for engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Chemical Engineering. Its Electrical Engineering and Automation major enjoys high recognition within Hebei Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have remained consistently popular or highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province grew from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025. In 2026, total examinees are about 609,800, with Physics Category estimated at about 364,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase over 2025, reflecting intensifying overall competition. Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin and is the only 211 university in Hebei Province. It has a very high enrollment proportion within the province (Physics Category plan of 3591 in 2025), and local examinees have strong willingness to apply, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings as a baseline, a slight 1% expansion in the 2026 plan, and a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, the 2026 ranking is expected to slightly rebound (harder to enter), but the expansion and examinee increase partially offset the rebound pressure. The predicted minimum ranking is about 75574, with a range of 75074–76074.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 75074–76074, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 75000), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper bound (around 76000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 majors for a safe backup.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4382 → 4398 → 5790 → 4770 → 5338, with significant fluctuations in recent 5 years. In 2023, it moved back to 5790, rebounded to 4770 in 2024, and moved back again to 5338 in 2025; the baseline ranking is about 5338. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 126 in 2021, 147 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 94 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 92, a slight reduction of about 2.13% compared to 2025, with limited reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking is stable in the 100–110 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its reputation is stable with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal signals in application popularity; the discipline evaluation data does not include A- or above level disciplines for this university, and the History Category enrollment majors are mainly Law, Foreign Languages, Public Administration, and Ideological and Political Education.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot/recommended, Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see, Ideological and Political Education is stable; the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province was 202,000 in 2021 → 244,000 in 2025, continuously increasing; in 2026, it is estimated to be about 244,000 by proportion, slightly higher than 2025, showing an upward trend. Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, the only 211 university in Hebei Province. Although the History Category enrollment plan is small, the willingness of local candidates to apply is strong, and regional preference is stable.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking backward baseline, a slight reduction of about 2% in the 2026 plan, and a slight increase in the number of History Category candidates, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with the ranking moving slightly forward (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 5220, with a range of 4720–5720.
